name: Logaritmo
description: Calcula el logaritmo de un número en cualquier base.
seo_description: Calcula el logaritmo de un número en cualquier base. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Con explicacion de estadisticas.
example_label: Calculate the logarithm of 256 with base 4.
result_context: The logarithm {log_val} is the power to which the base must be raised to get x.
steps: Apply change of base formula: ln(256) ÷ ln(4)
mistakes: Trying to calculate log of negative number or zero
Confusing natural log with log base 10
